title: benkara microcarpa
intro: Benkara microcarpa, also known as Indian spurge or bitter chikweed, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Benkara microcarpa include its ability to help manage fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Benkara microcarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
